name: Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine sugar, pumpkin, oil, water, and eggs; beat well.
2. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, baking powder, nutmeg, and cloves. Gradually add to pumpkin mixture and mix well.
3. Stir in walnuts and raisins if desired. Pour into a greased 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 65 or 70 minutes. Cool 10 minutes in the pan before removing to a wire rack.
NOTE: Keeps well in the freezer.
